mapper.select: SELECT /* TODO: 상세 컬럼 나열 */ a.pk_col , a.col1 , a.col2 , a.code_cd , (SELECT comm_cd_nm FROM sy_code_dtl WHERE wrk_tp_cd = '/* TODO */' AND cd_tp_cd = '/* TODO */' AND comm_cd = a.code_cd) AS code_cd_nm , a.rmk , TO_CHAR(a.firs_reg_dts, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS firs_reg_dts , TO_CHAR(a.fina_reg_dts, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS fina_reg_dts FROM /* TODO: 테이블명 */ a WHERE a.pk_col = #{pk_col}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM /* TODO: 테이블명 */ WHERE pk_col = #{pk_col}
